creators.affiliation: School of Information Mechanics and Sensing Engineering, Xidian University, Xi'an 710071, China; Department of Chemical and Biological Engineering, University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC V6T 1Z3, Canada

title: BasinGraph: geometry-controlled operational search-state optimization
description: Documentation and archive-composition release for the selected BasinGraph 2.0.0-rc1 implementation. The optimizer source, frozen options, benchmark runs, raw results and numerical conclusions are unchanged. This release aligns the public software archive with the prospective COCO/BBOB and CUTEst evidence and excludes legacy validation and applied-problem benchmark materials from the current archive.
